The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Nasturtium include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glucosinolates, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
